items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 20
items.note: For 'Attack of the Mad Cow' — defeat Whitney in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 20 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Dunsparce again — lead with it, take a hit and use Rage, and even Miltank falls. A Headbutt-caught Heracross from Azalea Town is another good option.
